channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Verge always left until 70cm tall in Buttercross Lane, 27th May
item.description:
Buttercross Lane GL52 5SF never regularly cut!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Buttercross Lane, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavamet has now got nothing underneath it and the whole is very deep and very wide under the surface and is likely to collapse if someone steps on it, 27th May
item.description:
The hole is next to Number 3 Gretton Road, right beside the road sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus timetables out of date, 27th May
item.description:
Hello Matt, Just thought to tell you that the stop at Coronation Square heading towards town on the A isn’t up to date with the new L service by Pulhams. On a different note how’s Market Parade doing, I’m assuming it’s still waiting for its RTPI.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coronation Square, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sinkhole in tarmac on Jersey Avenue, 27th May
item.description:
Directly outside driveway to no.18

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Jersey Avenue, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - bag of rubbish, 27th May
item.description:
Bag of rubbish left on walkway above Honeybourne - at the back of Jenner Court Flats. ///bought.oppose.branch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Georges Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and vandalised fencing, 27th May
item.description:
First reported via fixmystreet (22111837) on 5th May 2026 and forwarded to to Cheltenham borough council by Public Rights of Way Officer. The vandalised fencing now has fly-tipping in front of the damage. ///change.drip.avoid

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 large trade refuse bins, 27th May
item.description:
Since around the beginning of May, 4 large trade waste and recycling bins have been placed outside Sandford Park on London Road (opposite Richer Sounds). They are an eyesore and I don’t think they should be there. On 27May, one was overflowing with rubbish on one of the hottest days of the year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Barratt's Mill Lane, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I have been asked to raise an enquiry to have the H marking extended to include the entrance to my 2 car off road parking area in Fairfield Avenue, 27th May
item.description:
Rear of 52 Leckhampton Road, adjacent to 1 Fairfield Avenue

Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Drains are blocked and hole coming by gas manhole, 27th May
item.description:
They are located along Church Row/Meadow Court, Gretton GL54 5DE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alderton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Pothole CW 500x400x60mm approx 2 way stop and go Stats (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th May

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
28day with road closure please cut hedges both sides of CW to boundary approx 500m x 1m x 5m possible STATS (overhead cables) possible nesting birds. (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please cut back growth at base of tree to safe. 2 way stop and go (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please cut back growth at base of tree to safe. 2 way stop and go (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Railing at top of small incline has been damaged and now poses a serious risk of injury to passing cyclists, 27th May
item.description:
At top of the small hill above the pond. The railing has been damaged, probably by a vehicle. As such it now leans in towards the opposite barrier and presents a significant hazard to cyclists in an already overly-narrow and awkward downhill section. Serious injury to hip or leg is highly likely!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, King George Close, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
ENWD with 3 way traffic lights please cut and remove dead tree leaning toward CW (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is so baddly patched that is almost impossible for anyone with a wheelchair or with a pushchair to use., 27th May
item.description:
Outside number 10/8/6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holtham Avenue, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
